snippet: The Department of Education and Training (the department) arranges all insurance policies through the Victorian Managed Insurance Authority (VMIA). The policies all expire on 30 June each year. All data contained in this document should be used as a guide only. School councils requiring insurance that is additional to the coverage provided by the department are required to contact the VMIA to arrange cover. This does not apply to WorkCover . Where an incident occurs causing damage to any individual or property, schools should contact the department’s Incident and Security Operations Centre on 1800 126 126 . For more information on incident management refer to Reporting and Managing School Incidents (including emergencies) . Guidance Table of contents for the Guidance on insurance for schools 2. Guidance chapter introducing the insurance arrangements the Department has in place for schools and school councils Reviewed 18 July 2022
